sql_array: CREATE TABLE network_test (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, ip_address INET);
SELECT sys.network(ip_address) FROM network_test WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE network_test SET ip_address = inet '10.0.0.1/16' WHERE id = 1;
DELETE FROM network_test WHERE sys.network(ip_address) = sys.network(inet '192.168.1.0/24');
